workflows.name: Tender opportunity triage
workflows.summary: Assess whether a tender is worth pursuing by analysing buyer fit, mandatory requirements, evidence coverage, scoring signals, and delivery risk.
highlights: Score bid readiness using deterministic rules
Identify missing documents, policies, and proof points

workflows.name: Evidence coverage review
workflows.summary: Map proposed bid claims against approved proof points so unsupported statements are caught before response drafting.
highlights: Flag unsupported or weakly supported claims
Surface source chips for reviewer confidence

workflows.name: Compliance and submission check
workflows.summary: Review submission instructions, eligibility rules, pass/fail questions, declarations, attachments, and buyer-specific constraints.
highlights: Separate compliance blockers from quality scoring risks
